multi_step: Solving likely requires interpreting two separate disintegration routes, not a single direct lookup.
The task asks for three products X, Y and Z respectively, so the solver must resolve multiple unknowns and map them to the final ordered answer.
This is still a short objective item with fixed choices, so the reasoning depth appears moderate rather than very high.
verifiability: The answer is a fixed ordered set and also appears in the multiple-choice options, which makes final-answer checking straightforward.
The underlying chemistry/physics can be checked by conservation rules in the two nuclear reactions shown in the figure.
